creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
=> Comic_Neue.zip doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/rdkit-2021.03.5.
=> Attempting to fetch https://fonts.google.com/download?family=Comic%20Neue&dummy=/Comic_Neue.zip
fetch: https://fonts.google.com/download?family=Comic%20Neue&dummy=/Comic_Neue.zip: size unknown
fetch: https://fonts.google.com/download?family=Comic%20Neue&dummy=/Comic_Neue.zip: size of remote file is not known
Comic_Neue.zip                                         176 kB 5213 kBps    00s
=> Fetched file size mismatch (expected 179735, actual 180686)
=> Trying next site
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/rdkit-2021.03.5/Comic_Neue.zip
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/rdkit-2021.03.5/Comic_Neue.zip: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/rdkit-2021.03.5 and try again.
*** Error code 1

This isn't ideal and will break, preferably add it as build dependency and use the available port instead (release archive also includes ttf files).

See also
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=261222
